calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-26-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-26-2004 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/Settlement.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patty Lee Hubble.
Warren Woo, Esq., for Plaintiff Jan Huey.
Tamara Rudolph, Esq., for Defendant Kathy Barnes.
09:45 am. - Parties and counsels present in court and reached a settlement by stipulation.
Terms of the ORAL settlement were read into the record as follows:
Parties settled both the UD. and Unlawful Eviction (#417730) actions.
Plaintiff waives rent and lease agreement from 4-1-02 through 3-31-04.
Starting 4-1-04, Defendant shall pay regular rent again, with 1 room mate allowed.
Plaintiff to complete repairs by Mid March, waived $500.00 re-location payment.
Defendant agrees to dismissed any claim with The Rent Board and dismissing the wrongful eviction action.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
The wrongful eviction case is place on the CRC-225 calendar for dismissal on 4-20-04 at 10 a.m. in Dept. 212.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-17-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT KATHY
BARNES' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT -- Motion for summary judgment is granted.
No triable issue of fact exists re: defendant's status as a protected class member
under San Francisco Rent Ordinance. (PHA/301/SL) Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220
